title: FEITO PARA OS PERSEGUIDORES DE VENTOS LEVES
titleEn: MADE FOR THE LIGHT WIND CHASERS
summary: O Harlem Thrive LiteX é um kite de alto desempenho, com 3 estruturas, projetado para riders que se recusam a perder uma sessão. Seja perseguindo ventos ultra-leves num foil, fazendo saltos com a prancha ou simplesmente saindo antes de qualquer outro — ele entrega quando as condições parecem impossíveis. Todos os detalhes do Thrive LiteX foram otimizados para [...]
summaryEn:
he Harlem Thrive LiteX is a high-performance, 3-strut kite built for riders who refuse to miss a session. Whether you're chasing ultra-light winds on a foil, going for floaty board offs, or simply getting out before anyone else — it delivers when conditions seem impossible. Every detail of the Thrive LiteX has been optimised for [...]

The post

title: We Tried Kitesurfing in 5 Knots! | HARLEM Thrive LiteX Review
titleEn: We Tried Kitesurfing in 5 Knots! | HARLEM Thrive LiteX Review
summary:
Testing the brand new @harlemkitesurfing THRIVE LiteX, Harlem’s lightwind kite. Can you really kitesurf in 5 knots? We took the Thrive LiteX out on the water to see how early it gets going, how it feels in light wind and whether it could be one of the best lightwind kites so far.

The post
summaryEn:
